name: Tom Perez
subject: It is incumbent on all of us to speak out
body:
I hope you will join a vigil for Charlottesville near you
---
Derek --

What happened in Charlottesville this weekend was an act of domestic terrorism.

It was an act that should have been met with a swift and unequivocal denunciation from the highest levels of our government.

It should not take intense public pressure to force the President of the United States to condemn white supremacy. It should not take days of silence for the leader of this country to denounce Nazis and the KKK. But it did.

History will not forget that when the streets of Charlottesville echoed with evil, Donald Trump responded with silence.

**We will not be silent. We will speak out against white supremacy, fascism, racism, and oppression in every form -- it is incumbent on all of us who are able to do so.**

Tonight, and throughout the week, there will be vigils across the country to join in solidarity with Charlottesville and all those who are standing against hate.

**I hope you will join a vigil near you and use your voice to bend the arc of history more firmly towards justice:**

**[ SEARCH FOR A VIGIL](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052373f/4067b0a/3c1bbd2f7/7e6f5f46/3100343381/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Vigils?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SEARCH+FOR+A+VIGIL&utm_campaign=em_20170814_tp_f2&source=em_20170814_tp_f2")
** Thank you,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052373f/4067b0a/3c1bbd2f7/7e6f5f47/3100343381/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170814_tp_f2&source=em_20170814_tp_f2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052373f/4067b0a/3c1bbd2f7/7e6f5f44/3100343381/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170814_tp_f2&source=em_20170814_tp_f2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052373f/4067b0a/3c1bbd2f7/7e6f5f45/3100343381/VEsC/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170814_tp_f2&source=em_20170814_tp_f2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052373f/4067b0a/3c1bbd2f7/7e6f5f42/3100343381/VEsD/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170814_tp_f2&source=em_20170814_tp_f2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Republican Party of New Hampshire
subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Governor Sununu's Actions for New Hampshire Veterans
body:
PRESS RELEASE

For Immediate Release: August 14, 2017

Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310 ( tel:(202)%20321-5310 )

Statement from NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Governor Sununu's
Actions for New Hampshire Veterans

Concord, NH – NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the
following statement regarding Governor Sununu's latest actions to
deliver results for New Hampshire's Veterans:

"Today Governor Sununu once again is taking matters into his own
hands to ensure that our New Hampshire Veterans receive the high
quality care they deserve. It is shameful that our Federal
Delegation has failed our veterans. Thank you, Governor Sununu,
for thinking outside of the box to ensure that our New Hampshire
Veterans and their health care are a number one priority."

###

footer image

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com ( dpwillis67@gmail.com )

name: Republican Party of New Hampshire
subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on violence in Charlottesville
body:
PRESS RELEASE

For Immediate Release: August 14, 2017

Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310 ( tel:(202)%20321-5310 )

Statement from NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on violence in
Charlottesville

Concord, NH – NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the
following statement regarding the violence in Charlottesville:

"I join President Trump, Governor Chris Sununu, RNC Chair Ronna
McDaniel and countless other Republican leaders from across the
country in condemning the hatred and violence we saw this past
weekend carried out in Virginia by white supremacists. Hatred and
violence have no place in our civil discourse."

"We all must reject this violent evil. This is not a time for
partisan bickering- these agitators act outside of mainstream
politics, and we must all unite against radical and dangerous
views these movements represent."

###

footer image

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com ( dpwillis67@gmail.com )

google analytics
clean_body: PRESS RELEASE For Immediate Release: August 14, 2017 Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310 ( tel:(202)%20321-5310 ) Statement from NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on violence in Charlottesville Concord, NH – NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding the violence in Charlottesville: "I join President Trump, Governor Chris Sununu, RNC Chair Ronna McDaniel and countless other Republican leaders from across the country in condemning the hatred and violence we saw this past weekend carried out in Virginia by white supremacists. Hatred and violence have no place in our civil discourse." "We all must reject this violent evil. This is not a time for partisan bickering- these agitators act outside of mainstream politics, and we must all unite against radical and dangerous views these movements represent." footer image

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Join me for a BBQ, please?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Did you know that in 2016, Durham was one of just a handful of college towns in America that saw an increase in voter turnout among young people?
That is why I am so excited to be supporting the New Hampshire Young Democrats at their annual [**BBQ at Smuttynose Brewery this Wednesday**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde2f/2a380d31/1e463479/fe5250/2573884135/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017smuttynosebbq?refcode=mwh4nhyd").
As the only progressive organization that is organizing young people statewide, they need our support now more than ever. I hope you will join me by [**buying a ticket here**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde2f/2a380d31/1e463479/fe5250/2573884135/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017smuttynosebbq?refcode=mwh4nhyd") or [**donating directly to them here.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde2f/2a380d31/1e463479/fe5251/2573884135/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nh-young-democrats-1?refcode=mwh4nhyd")
I hope to see you there!
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde2f/2a380d31/1e463479/fe5252/2573884135/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN3NtdXR0eW5vc2ViYnEiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDgxNF9OSFlELUJCUV9uaCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017smuttynosebbq?refcode=e20170814_NHYD-BBQ_nh&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde2f/2a380d31/1e463479/fe5253/2573884135/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States
